zh.St John The Baptist, Lewes, Sussex, Engl: 英國英格蘭素可列維斯
zh.West Hanningfield, Essex, England: 英國艾可韋斯特 韓寧費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas Pelham於1514年出生在英國素可勞頓時，他的父親Sir William Pelham I46歲，母親Mary Carew25歲。他於大約1541年與Anne Sackville在英國英格蘭素可列維斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1560年12月15日在他的家鄉享年46歲，埋葬在英國素可列維斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas Pelham于1514年出生在英国素可勞頓时，他的父亲Sir William Pelham I46岁，母亲Mary Carew25岁。他于大约1541年与Anne Sackville在英国英格兰素可列維斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1560年12月15日在他的家乡享年46岁，埋葬在英国素可列維斯。

nameMeanings.name: Pelham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Sussex): habitational name from Brent Pelham, Furneux Pelham, and Stocking Pelham in Hertfordshire, so called from the Old English personal name Pēola + hām ‘homestead’. Compare Pellham .

History: The manor of Pelham in Hertfordshire, England, was held by Walter de Pelham in the reign of Edward I (1272–1307). His descendants became constables of Pevensey Castle, Sussex, and were so influential that their badge, the buckle, is seen in at least eleven of the county's churches, and as a decoration on iron chimney-backs in Sussex farmhouses. Various branches of the family were ennobled and their titles include earl of Chichester and earl of Yarborough. The family also once held the dukedom of Newcastle and the marquessate of Clare. Peter Pelham (born c. 1695), an engraver, emigrated to Boston, MA, after 1728, and was stepfather to the artist John Singleton Copley.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas Pelham was born in 1514, in Laughton, Sussex, England, his father, Sir William Pelham I, was 46 and his mother, Mary Carew, was 25. He married Anne Sackville about 1541, in Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 15 December 1560, in his hometown, at the age of 46, and was buried in Lewes, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas Pelham est né en 1514, à Laughton, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Pelham I, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Mary Carew, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Anne Sackville environ 1541, à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 15 décembre 1560, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas Pelham 1514 in Laughton, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Pelham I 46 und seine Mutter Mary Carew 25. Er hat um 1541 in Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Anne Sackville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Dezember 1560 im Alter von 46 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lewes, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Pelham è nato il nel 1514 nel Laughton, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir William Pelham I, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Mary Carew, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Anne Sackville circa 1541, nel Lewes, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 15 dicembre 1560, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Lewes, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Pelhamが1514年にイギリススセックスラウトンで生まれた時，父Sir William Pelham Iは46歳，母Mary Carewは25歳であった。約1541年にイギリスイギリススセックスルスでAnne Sackvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1560年12月15日に故郷で46歳で死去し，イギリススセックスルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Pelham(이)가 1514년 영국 수세스 로그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Pelham I(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Carew(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1541년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 루스에서 Anne Sackville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1560년 12월 15일 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 루스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Pelham nasceu em 1514, em Laughton, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Pelham I, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Mary Carew, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Sackville aproximadamente 1541, em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de dezembro de 1560, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas Pelham родился в 1514 г. в местности лотон, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Pelham I было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Carew, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Sackville около 1541 г. в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 15 декабря 1560 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Nicholas Pelham nació en 1514, en Laughton, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Pelham I, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Mary Carew, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Anne Sackville aproximadamente 1541, en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 15 de diciembre de 1560, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.
